summary: Bug fix verification: admin document download flow. Tested BOTH backend (pytest 4/4 PASS) and frontend (Playwright E2E PASS). The button-based download with axios+Bearer auth works end-to-end: file is uploaded, appears in admin panel, and is downloadable via authenticated request returning the original PDF binary.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} (Radix a11y). Add <DialogDescription> or aria-describedby to the DialogContent for accessibility.

action_items: (Optional/low-prio) Add DialogDescription or aria-describedby to admin Lead detail Dialog to silence Radix a11y warning
critical_code_review_comments: server.py download_document correctly enforces get_current_admin → 401 without token (verified)

LeadsManager.downloadDoc properly uses axios.get with Authorization header + responseType:'blob' then triggers Blob/createObjectURL download (verified — no token leak in URL, no window.open with ?token=...)
Download button is correctly a <button type='button'> (not <a href>), confirmed via DOM inspection in Playwright (tagName === 'BUTTON', href === null)
Content-Disposition includes the original filename (TEST_DL_id.pdf / TEST_DL_slip.pdf) — browser uses suggested_filename correctly
Backend returns application/octet-stream as intended to force download
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up a TEST_Playwright Download lead with 2 PDF documents via API; test fixture auto-deletes lead in teardown
context_for_next_testing_agent: Doc download bug is fully fixed. Backend endpoint at server.py:566 requires Bearer admin token (401 without). Frontend LeadsManager.js:67-86 uses axios+blob+createObjectURL (no <a href> leak). E2E verified via Playwright page.expect_download() — both identity and salary docs download successfully with correct filename and binary content. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_iter11_doc_download.py (4 tests, all pass).
rca_of_the_issue: ORIGINAL BUG: frontend used <a href={url}> to trigger download, which makes a plain navigation request without the Authorization header → backend returns 401 'Non autorisé'. FIX (already applied by main agent): replaced with <button onClick> calling downloadDoc() which uses axios.get with {headers: Bearer, responseType: 'blob'}, then constructs a Blob, createObjectURL, and clicks a synthetic <a download> to save the file. VERIFIED: Playwright captured the actual download event (page.expect_download) and confirmed Bearer header on the request + 200 response + non-empty PDF binary with original filename.
